name: Reluctant Queen
description:
Wanting to live a simple life, but fate is not so kind. The succession went awry and now she's the only one left capable of leading

Who will you be? Her butler/maid? Her Knight? A spy from another place? A random stranger/noble?

Your relationship is NOT defined to allow more varied roleplay

Life has been really busy recently and I don't have much drive to return to this site(I still like making bots though). The best-case scenario is 1 bot a week. worst case scenario, 1 bot a month

I'm gonna post another bot later or tomorrow (if nothing happens)

I've only been playing with bots on my follow list, I don't really go to trending or popular pages anymore

Also I'll delete my non-character bots (stuff like announcements and more)

To avoid the bot talking for you be sure to write in this format:

*Action/Narration/Thoughts* Dialogue/Mutter/Groaning/Moaning

.

(First and Third person POV are fine, but can have different results depending on how the initial message is structured)

.

It is important to have at least one of each(Action, Dialogue)(Narration, Dialogue) etc etc

it can be multiple and in any order

(Dialogue, Action, Dialogue, Thoughts)

(Thoughts, Dialogue, Action)

IF IT STILL TALKS FOR YOU, RETRY OR MAKE MORE DETAILS IN YOUR MESSAGE.

.

IT IS ALSO POSSIBLE IT ONLY TALKS FOR YOU IN A SHORT SECTION, YOU CAN JUST EDIT THAT OUT

No First Message Suggestion

*I approach her*

should be good enough, just add more or some dialogue

There's finally a custom tag, don't know how to access it though lol
creator: NotHorny
